home.headline: Scan your site against OWASP Top 10
home.description: Verify ownership, run the scan, share your results. Get a security score in minutes.
home.feature1Desc: Confirm you own the domain via DNS TXT, meta tag, or a well-known file.
home.feature2Desc: We check headers, SSL/TLS, cookie flags, and run OWASP ZAP for injection and misconfig tests.
home.feature3Desc: Get a score out of 65 mapped to OWASP Top 10 categories, with actionable findings.

login.title: Sign in to OwaspChecker
login.subtitle: Sign in to scan your websites
login.terms: By signing in you agree to our Terms of Service. We only request read access to your email.

dashboard.title: Your Websites
dashboard.subtitle: Add a domain, verify ownership, then scan it against OWASP Top 10.
dashboard.noWebsites: No websites yet. Add one above to get started.

site.noScans: No analyses yet. Click "Start Scan" to begin.
site.deleteConfirm: Delete this site and all its scans?
site.deleteError: Could not delete the site. Please try again.
site.domainAlreadyInList: This domain is already in your list.
site.domainClaimedByOther: This domain has already been verified by another user.

verify.title: Verify ownership of {domain}
verify.subtitle: Choose a verification method and follow the instructions.
verify.failed: Verification failed. Make sure the token is correctly placed and try again.

scan.subtitle: OWASP Top 10 scan
scan.noScans: No scans yet. Click "Start Scan" to begin.
scan.running: Scan in progress… this may take a few minutes.
scan.newScanDesc: Run a new OWASP Top 10 scan against this domain.
scan.basicDesc: Passive header analysis + OWASP ZAP active scan. Score up to 65/100.
scan.completeDesc: Everything in Basic, plus static code analysis covering all 10 OWASP categories. Score up to 100/100.
scan.zipSizeLimit: Max 50 MB. Excludes node_modules, .git, build, dist, .next.
scan.zipTooLarge: ZIP file exceeds the 50 MB limit.
scan.privacyDesc: Source code is processed entirely in memory and discarded immediately after analysis. It is never written to disk, logged, or persisted in any form.
scan.verificationWarning: Code verification inconclusive — SAST results may not reflect this specific site.
scan.verificationFailed: The source code could not be verified as belonging to this website. Upload the source code for the correct domain.
scan.invalidDesc: The uploaded source code could not be confirmed as belonging to this website. No analysis was saved.

prompt.modalSubtitle: Copy this prompt and paste it into your AI assistant.

ranking.title: Security Ranking
ranking.subtitle: Sites that opted in to show their OWASP score publicly.
ranking.noSites: No sites in the ranking yet.
